recommendations.title: The Cat Concerto
recommendations.overview: Tom Cat is a concert pianist who plays beautifully until he is interrupted by Jerry Mouse.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo Meets Batman
recommendations.overview: Scooby-Doo Meets Batman is a video compilation from Warner Bros. Home Entertainment. It consists of two episodes from Hanna-Barbera's The New Scooby-Doo Movies, "The Dynamic Scooby Doo Affair" and "The Caped Crusader Caper", where Scooby-Doo and the

recommendations.title: Ron's Gone Wrong
recommendations.overview: In a world where walking, talking, digitally connected bots have become children's best friends, an 11-year-old finds that his robot buddy doesn't quite work the same as the others do.

recommendations.title: Nimona
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Action, Drama, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A knight framed for a tragic crime teams with a scrappy, shape-shifting teen to prove his innocence.

recommendations.title: The Bad Guys
recommendations.overview: When the Bad Guys, a crew of criminal animals, are finally caught after years of heists and being the world’s most-wanted villains, Mr. Wolf brokers a deal to save them all from prison.

recommendations.title: Auntie Edna
recommendations.overview: Taking place during the events of Incredibles 2, Edna Mode babysits Jack-Jack.

recommendations.title: Phineas and Ferb the Movie: Candace Against the Universe
recommendations.overview: Phineas and Ferb travel across the galaxy to rescue their older sister Candace, who has been abducted by aliens and taken to a utopia in a far-off planet, free of her pesky little brothers.

recommendations.title: Tom and Jerry: Shiver Me Whiskers

recommendations.title: Almost Home
recommendations.overview: A group of aliens searching for a new planet on which to make home, with little success. Promotional short for Dreamworks Animation's forthcoming feature, Home.

recommendations.title: The Transformers: The Movie
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Action, Adventure, Family
recommendations.overview: The Autobots must stop a colossal planet-consuming robot who goes after the Autobot Matrix of Leadership. At the same time, they must defend themselves against an all-out attack from the Decepticons.
